creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
After updating nextcloud on a recent CURRENT server (FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #71 r328457: Sat Jan 27 06:07:44 CET 2018 amd64), nextcloud access can't be establish any more and any attempt to perform a manual update via "su -m www -c 'php ./occ' while in /usr/local/www/nextcloud (which is the standard procedure) is quit by a segmentation fault.

The ports tree is up to date and so the installed ports.
